case_title: CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC. VS. DIONICIA BUENDIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC. ASSIGNEE OF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUENDIA, DIONICIA $2,537.87 PRINCIPAL, $314.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,851.87, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-18-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
